Template for submitting feature requests with required fields and optional context.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines a template for submitting feature requests in a software project. It specifies a form with several fields that users must complete when proposing a new feature. The form includes a checkbox section to confirm if the user has searched for existing issues related to the feature request, ensuring that duplicate requests are minimized. Additionally, the form requires users to provide a concise description of the proposed feature, consider alternative solutions, and offer any additional context or references. The use of labels such as `feature` helps categorize and manage the submitted requests efficiently.
